calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-10-2010 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings not reported. (212)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-30-2010 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-12-2010 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Aug-03-10 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-25-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Defendant's Counsel for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is ordered off calendar and dissolved/fee paid. Proceedings not reported. (212)

Off Calendar Oct-02-2009 Set For Trial On May-03-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Apr-15-10 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 505
